commands.name: browser_visual_smoke
commands.command: Open http://localhost:3003, open recipe editor, capture desktop and 390px mobile viewport

notes: Recipe editor modal was checked against the Canvas-style vertical modal structure. Shopping selection now matches the Canvas flow: calculate shortages, choose with checkboxes, then insert selected shopping_items. InventoryBoard now receives and renders shopping_items, and recipe-side insertion refreshes route data. Existing recipe save paths were not changed.
